case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 998 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioners nor any intimation is received. Even on the last date of hearing i.e. 25.10.2023, Mr. Shahid Ali Memon, Advocate held brief on behalf of Counsel for the petitioners. Learned AAG submits that earlier on the same advertisement, the present petitioners had filed C.P No.D-178 of 2020, which was dismissed vide order dated 02.03.2022. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners, therefore, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
